summary: Completed full e2e testing of FeelAtHomeNow backend APIs and frontend. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend apartments page, city filters, contact form submission, and language switcher all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Email notifications are NOT functional - SendGrid API key not configured (email_sent=false for all inquiries) - This is expected per requirements
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 apartments on startup from seed_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend APIs: GET /api/apartments, GET /api/apartments?city=X, POST /api/contact, GET /api/admin/inquiries all working. Frontend: Apartments page loads from API, city filters work (Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Zug, All), contact form submits successfully and clears, language switcher (DE/EN) works. SendGrid email not configured (expected - user will add API key later).

backend_api_tests: GET /api/apartments - Returns 8 apartments with localized fields
POST /api/contact (German) - Returns success with German message
POST /api/contact (English) - Returns success with English message
Contact persistence test - Verified data saved to MongoDB
frontend_ui_tests: Apartments page loads apartments from API
City filter buttons (Alle, Zürich, Genf, Basel, Zug) visible and functional
Zurich filter shows only Zurich apartments
Basel filter shows only 1 Basel apartment
All filter resets to show all apartments
Contact form fields (name, email, phone, company, message) work
Contact form submission shows success toast
Contact form clears after successful submission
